tasks.name: **Task name**: Provision secure PostgreSQL 15 + TimescaleDB instance with encryption-at-rest and RLS skeleton
tasks.description: Install PostgreSQL 15.5 + TimescaleDB 2.14 on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS; configure native `pgcrypto`, enable transparent data encryption (TDE) via `pg_tde` (or filesystem-level LUKS if `pg_tde` unavailable); define minimal RLS policies for tenant isolation (`branch_id` column required on all PII-audited tables).
tasks.inputs_outputs: Running DB instance; verified `SELECT pg_encrypted_tables()` (or LUKS status); `SHOW row_security; → on`

tasks.name: **Task name**: Implement TimescaleDB hypertable for GDPR/JR/T-compliant audit logging
tasks.description: Create `audit_log` hypertable partitioned by `event_time` (1-day chunks); add compression policy (7-day retention); enforce JR/T 0171-2020 §6.4.3 via `data_minimization_trigger()` that strips non-essential fields (e.g., full biometric hash → salted SHA-256 truncated to 32 chars) before insert.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Compressed hypertable; `SELECT * FROM audit_log ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 5` shows truncated hashes & anonymized IPs

tasks.name: **Task name**: Configure NGINX-based Edge Gateway to require and validate kiosk client certificates
tasks.description: Deploy NGINX 1.24+ as reverse proxy; configure mTLS with CA-signed client certs issued per branch; reject requests missing `SSL_CLIENT_VERIFY: SUCCESS` or invalid `SSL_CLIENT_S_DN_CN` (must match registered branch ID regex `^BR-[0-9]{4}$`). Log validation failures to `audit_log`.
tasks.inputs_outputs: `curl -k --cert kiosk.crt --key kiosk.key https://gateway/api/health → 200`; invalid CN → `403` + audit entry

tasks.name: **Task name**: Build Yocto Kirkstone (4
tasks.description: Create custom Yocto layer (`meta-kiosk`) adding `chromium-ozone-wayland`, disabling screen blanking, enabling kiosk mode (`--kiosk --no-sandbox --disable-features=Translate,PasswordGeneration`), and auto-starting via `systemd` service (`kiosk.service`). Enforce read-only rootfs.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Flashable `.wic.gz` image; booted system launches Chromium full-screen to `https://localhost:8443`

tasks.name: **Task name**: Implement local SQLite policy engine enforcing offline PII/biometric residency rules
tasks.inputs_outputs: `./policy-engine.py --validate → OK` (if compliant); `ERROR: Biometric data not encrypted` (if violated)

tasks.name: **Task name**: Build Python FastAPI service to auto-generate RLS policies per branch registration
tasks.description: Create REST endpoint `POST /v1/branches` accepting `{ "branch_id": "BR-5678", "tenant_name": "Shanghai Branch" }`. Service:
